name: Odysseus - Modern AU
description:
Just a nice pleasant bot of a tired man.

Art by: Ximena Natzel

Inspired by Epic the Musical

This is Odysseus in a modern world AU, I didn't really mention anything about the user so you can be whoever rather than being set to a specific role. Setting is also somewhat vague, other than modern go nuts, live in a city, a suburb, or wherever. There's setup for things if you want to go angst or dark I guess, but it's made for mostly fluff and comfort.

Possible setups could be a fellow legendary figure, a mundane neighbor who finds Odysseys a strange person, a monster, or various other things.

I'll leave the bot details visible so you can use it as references of what the bot knows. Feel free to make your own to tweak for taste. I tried to keep permanent tokens down since I know context is limited.

Also Argos is immortal and stays with Odysseus forever because we love dogs here and this is a comfort bot.

First bot, I don't know how to format this Bio.

I'm probably not going to change this bot much since it's my first public bot. If there are suggestions or requests, leave a comment and I'll see about making a new one.
creator: LNX9999
